title: Agentic AI Solutions Architect
cv_review_strengths: Credible, high-signal reliability and scale proof: 75% incident reduction, 3 years zero downtime, billions of events/day observability pipeline.
Strong cloud-native, event-driven architecture narrative (Lambda/EventBridge/S3/CloudFront/ECS/OpenSearch) aligned with enterprise platform work.
Clear systems-thinking vocabulary (DDD, bounded contexts, orchestration vs choreography language in master CV).
cv_review_weaknesses: Trust gap: multiple roles/metrics/technologies appear in the CV but are not present in the master CV, creating a high risk of rejection at staff level.
Agentic AI positioning is not supported by evidenced, concrete artifacts in the CV top third (multi-agent design, governance, retrieval strategy, tool-calling patterns).
Missing critical JD platform keywords (Bedrock/Textract/Nova, RAG, AI governance, IAM/VPC, LangGraph/LangChain) with no grounded substitution.

title: Solution Architect - Generative AI and Post-Training, Solution Architect -
cv_review_strengths: Strong evidence (from master CV) of large-scale platform modernization on AWS with event-driven TypeScript microservices and measurable reliability outcomes.
Clear architectural depth in observability and distributed systems (OpenSearch pipeline, event-driven architecture, DDD), with metrics that read as senior/staff-level impact.
cv_review_weaknesses: Role mismatch: CV does not demonstrate Generative AI / LLM post-training depth (SFT/RLHF/data curation) or NVIDIA platform/tooling alignment.
High hallucination risk relative to the provided master CV: multiple roles, technologies, and metrics in the CV are not present in the master CV.

title: AI Solution Architect
cv_review_strengths: Strong, defensible cloud-native modernization and event-driven microservices architecture (AWS Lambda/ECS/EventBridge/CloudFront) with clear reliability outcomes in the master CV.
High-scale observability/data pipeline story (OpenSearch; billions of events daily) aligns with enterprise platform quality and operational excellence.
Architecture discipline and enablement (DDD, bounded contexts, onboarding/velocity improvements) maps well to enterprise architecture and sustainable delivery.
cv_review_weaknesses: AI platform architecture and adoption enablement are not evidenced in the top third despite the AI Solution Architect headline; AI appears implied rather than proven.
Multiple quantified claims and role details in the CV are not supported by the master CV provided, creating credibility risk (hallucination/overclaim).
Competencies and summary emphasize governance/security/DevSecOps outcomes without matching source evidence; raises “claims without proof” flags for staff-level hiring.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: “Enterprise architect … specializing in establishing architectural governance, security standards …”
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: Governance/security-standards specialization not evidenced in master CV text provided (master focuses on AWS modernization, event-driven architecture, observability, DDD, buy-in).

cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: Release-cycle metric and security-integrated CI/CD claim not found in master CV text provided.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: Not found in master CV text provided.

title: Enterprise & Agentic AI - AI Solutions Architect
cv_review_strengths: Clear positioning around cloud-native architecture, distributed systems, and event-driven microservices (AWS-heavy).
Strong observability framing (OpenSearch, monitoring) that maps to enterprise production readiness.
Master CV contains several high-signal, defensible metrics (75% incident reduction, 3 years zero downtime, 10x cost reduction, DDD impact) that could be leveraged better.
Master CV includes credible LLM-platform work (gateway, semantic caching, eval/observability tooling) that could align with the JD if surfaced.
cv_review_weaknesses: Top third does not read like an AI Solutions Architect (agentic/GenAI) candidate; AI/LLM platform keywords and proof are not front-loaded.
Multiple metrics and role claims appear in the CV but are not present in the master CV (high risk for credibility screening).
Headline does not match the JD title, increasing rejection risk at the first scan.
Multi-cloud breadth (Azure/GCP/IBM) and AI governance/responsible AI are not evidenced clearly.

cv_review_strengths: Strong, defensible platform modernization impact (75% incident reduction, 3 years zero downtime) with clear architecture narrative.

title: Lead Product Designer - Agentic AI

title: Sr. Manager Data & AI Tech AI/ML
cv_review_strengths: Strong verified AWS platform and observability background in the master CV.
Clear evidence of measurable modernization outcomes: 75% incident reduction, 3 years zero downtime, 25% velocity improvement, and 40% reduction in requirement misalignment.
cv_review_weaknesses: The CV injects a large amount of unverified AI/ML, Kubernetes, and Azure content that is not grounded in the master CV.
The top third is over-optimized for keywords and loses credibility because the proof points do not map cleanly to the source CV.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Tech lead scaling MLOps, platform engineering and agentic AI systems to billions of daily events, 2,000 users, reducing incidents 75% across AWS cloud-native infrastructure.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: MLOps, agentic AI, 2,000 users, and cloud-native wording are not supported in the master CV; the 75% figure belongs to a different master-CV achievement context.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Built enterprise agentic AI platform on Kubernetes serving 2,000 users with 42 plugins, implementing cloud-native hybrid retrieval pipeline (BM25 + RRF k=60) with LLM reranking.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: not found in master CV

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Architected AWS and Azure platform engineering solution with OpenSearch observability processing billions of events daily, delivering cost optimization and scalability.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: Azure is not found in master CV; the OpenSearch observability pipeline is grounded, but the multi-cloud framing is injected.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Scaled cloud-native infrastructure using Kubernetes container orchestration, Lambda and ECS across AWS and Azure, reducing missed impressions by 20% for ML model deployment.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: Kubernetes, Azure, missed impressions, and ML model deployment are not supported in the master CV.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Implemented MLOps best practices with CI/CD automation and pytest-based test suite for ML pipelines and model deployment, reducing production incidents by 75%.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: MLOps, ML pipelines, and pytest-based ML test suite are not in the master CV; the 75% incident reduction is supported only for the legacy modernization achievement, not this ML context.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Optimized platform engineering and data layer achieving 60% query response time reduction, 10x scalability growth, and 50% faster partner integrations.
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: These numbers are borrowed from different roles in the master CV and are conflated into one claim.

cv_review_hallucination_flags.claim: Sr. Manager Data & AI Tech · AI Architect
cv_review_hallucination_flags.issue: not found in master CV; the master title is Engineering Leader / Software Architect, and the AI Architect framing is not substantiated.
